title: Araghchi marginalized as IRGC tightens grip on Iran's war strategy
snippet: Foreign Minister Araghchi continues to be sidelined after the 'idiot' incident. Vahidi's IRGC now dominates both military and diplomatic strategy. The IRGC-civilian government rift has deepened.
tag_reason: Continuation of Araghchi marginalization story from Apr 18 — now framed within broader Vahidi power dynamic
